title: Chandigarh、Chandigarh — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Chandigarh、Chandigarh的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Chandigarh是Chandigarh的一個城市，人口約1,150,000。India’s first planned city, designed by Le Corbusier, known for its modernist architecture, Rock Garden, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
